---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, flag, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What command / flag / behavior would make it easy?

```
cursell ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, related issues, anything else.
